title: AerialRobot + Quadcopter
summary: All 15 acceptance criteria verified after fixing 2 bugs in Phase 04 code and 1 pre-existing bug in Phase 01 code. Phase 04 deliverables are functionally correct.

pre_existing.description: Calls Utils.quatToRotmx() without robot. package prefix. Fails in MATLAB R2024b. DifferentialDrive.m correctly uses robot.Utils.quatToRotmx().
pre_existing.fix: Change Utils.quatToRotmx → robot.Utils.quatToRotmx and Utils.rotmxToRPY → robot.Utils.rotmxToRPY

phase_04.description: Calls DynamicsEngine.rk4Step() without robot. package prefix. Same resolution issue as Robot.m.
buildGeometry(): faces = [bf; df] concatenates 6×4 (body quads) with 32×3 (rotor triangle fans). MATLAB errors on dimension mismatch.
phase_04.fix: Changed df from zeros(4*nDisk, 3) to NaN(4*nDisk, 4) and padded each row with NaN as 4th column

AerialRobot.description: step(t, dt) overrides base with RK4 via DynamicsEngine
step() handles empty Control by defaulting to zeros(4,1)

Quadcopter.description: Properties match spec (armLength, bodySize, mass, inertia, maxThrust, kTorque)
move(direction, amount) produces correct thrust delta per ADR table
STOP zeros control; RESET calls reset()
Control is ADDITIVE then clamped to [0, maxThrust]
buildGeometry() returns [verts, faces, edges] with body + arms + rotor disks
Gravity projected into body frame via R' * g_world
Euler equation: I*domega + cross(omega, I*omega) = T
plot() creates wireframe with light blue FaceColor [0.8 0.8 0.9]

demo.m.description: Quadcopter case present with correct params

Integration.description: All files parse without syntax errors
Aerial commands on DifferentialDrive still silently ignored
Quadcopter step() correctly uses AerialRobot's override
RK4 step maintains quaternion unit norm

notes: Pre-existing bug in Robot.m (Phase 01): unqualified Utils calls without robot. prefix. DifferentialDrive.m already uses robot.Utils correctly.
Phase 04 had 2 BLOCKER bugs (both fixed): missing robot. prefix on DynamicsEngine in AerialRobot.m, and face dimension mismatch in Quadcopter buildGeometry.
After fixes, all criteria verified via automated test script (.agent/logs/test_phase04.m).

MATLAB R2024b does not resolve same-package class names without full prefix from within package class files (contrary to documentation). All unqualified references to sibling package classes should use the robot. prefix.

The computeDynamics implementation differs slightly from ADR-0003: uses obj.kTorque instead of obj.params.dynamics.kTorque (preferred for hot-loop performance), and builds the edge line with both vertices [edges(i,:)] instead of one vertex [edges(i,1)] (correctly draws line segments).
ADR-0003 lists params.dynamics.maxTorque in the struct but Quadcopter uses kTorque instead. The demo sets both; the unused maxTorque field is benign.
recommendation: APPROVED after applying the two Phase 04 fixes. Recommend fixing the pre-existing Robot.m issue separately.
